mapper.select: select value, text from(select distinct STATUS as value, 'status' as text from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where status is not null order by STATUS asc) UNION all select value,text from (select distinct FIELD_CLASS AS VALUE, 'fieldClass' as text from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where FIELD_CLASS is not null order by FIELD_CLASS ASC) UNION ALL SELECT VALUE,TEXT FROM (SELECT DISTINCT SECRET_CLASS AS VALUE, 'securityLevel' as text from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where SECRET_CLASS IS NOT NULL order by SECRET_CLASS ASC)

select s.FIELDID as fieldId,COLUMNNAME as columnName, FIELDNAME as fieldName, FIELDCHINESENAME as fieldChineseName, FIELDDESCRIBE as fieldDescribe, FIELDTYPE as fieldType, FIELDLEN as fieldLen, DEFAULTVALUE as defaultValue, MEMO as memo,s.codeid as codeId, SAMEID as sameId, IS530NEW as is530New,VERSIONS as versions, Releasedate as releaseDate, FULL_CHINSEE as fullChinese,SIM_CHINESE as simChinese,SYNONY_NAME as synonyName, OBJECT_TYPE as objectType , EXPRESSION_WORD as expressionWord, CODEID_DETAIL as codeIdDetail,ISNORMAL as isNorMal,RELATE as relate,UNIT as unit, FUSE_TYPE as fuseType, FUSE_FIELDID as fuseFieldId,STATUS as statusNum, SUB_ORG as subOrg, SUB_AUTHOR as subAuthor,ON_DATE as onDate, REG_ORG as regOrg,FIELD_CLASS as fieldClass,SECRET_CLASS as secretClass,FIELD_STANDARD as fieldStandard, FACTURER as facturer, f.CODETEXT as codeIdStr , case when o.relatedTablesCount is null then 0 else o.relatedTablesCount end as relatedTablesCount,context,"constraint",CREATETIME as createTime,UPDATETIME as updateTime,CREATOR as creator, UPDATER as updater,GADSJ_FIELDID as gadsjFieldId,FIELD_RELATES as fieldRelates,s.ATTRIBUTE_WORD as attributeWord from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD s LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT CODEID,CODETEXT FROM synlte.FIELDCODE) F ON UPPER(S.CODEID) = UPPER(F.CODEID) left join (select fieldid,count(distinct objectid) as relatedTablesCount from ( select o1.objectid,o2.fieldid from synlte.OBJECT o1 inner join synlte.objectfield o2 on o1.objectid = o2.objectid where upper(o1.relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and o2.deleted = 0) group by fieldid) o on upper(s.FIELDID) = upper(o.fieldid)
S.FIELDID NOT LIKE 'WBZ%' and field_standard != '99'
and ( upper(s.FIELDID) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchName},'%'))) or upper(FIELDNAME) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchName},'%'))) or upper(FIELDCHINESENAME) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchName},'%'))) )
and FIELD_CLASS in (
select #{item} from dual
)
and (FIELD_CLASS in (
select #{item} from dual
) or FIELD_CLASS is null )
and SECRET_CLASS in (
select #{item} from dual
)
and (SECRET_CLASS in (
select #{item} from dual
) or SECRET_CLASS is null )
and STATUS in (
select #{item} from dual
)
and (STATUS in (
select #{item} from dual
) or STATUS is null )
order by ${sort} ${sortOrder} nulls last

select distinct name from( select distinct FIELDCHINESENAME as name from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD
where upper(FIELDCHINESENAME) like upper(concat(#{searchName},'%')) and (deleted =0 or deleted is null)
union all select distinct FIELDNAME as name from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD
where upper(FIELDNAME) like upper(concat(#{searchName},'%')) and (deleted =0 or deleted is null)
union all select distinct SIM_CHINESE as name from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD
where upper(SIM_CHINESE) like upper(concat(#{searchName},'%')) and (deleted =0 or deleted is null)
union all select distinct FIELDID as name from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD
where upper(FIELDID) like upper(concat(#{searchName},'%')) and (deleted =0 or deleted is null)
)
select count(0) from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where upper(FIELDID) = upper(#{fieldId}) and (deleted =0 or deleted is null)
select Releasedate from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where upper(FIELDID) = upper(#{fieldId})
select to_char(UPDATETIME,'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where upper(FIELDID) = upper(#{fieldId}) and (deleted =0 or deleted is null)

select distinct sameid as value, wordname as text from synlte.sameword where deleted =0 and sameid is not null and wordname is not null
and ( upper(sameid) like upper(concat(#{searchName},'%')) or upper(wordname) like upper(concat(#{searchName},'%')) )
select distinct SIM_CHINESE from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where upper(SIM_CHINESE) like upper(concat(#{name},'%'))
select count(0) from synlte.sameword where upper(sameid) = upper(#{sameId})
select count(0) from synlte.FIELDCODE where upper(codeid) = upper(#{codeId})
select count(0) from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where upper(COLUMNNAME) = upper(#{column})
mapper.update:
update synlte.SYNLTEFIELD set COLUMNNAME = upper(#{columnName}), FIELDNAME = upper(#{fieldName}), FIELDCHINESENAME = #{fieldChineseName}, FIELDDESCRIBE = #{fieldDescribe}, FIELDTYPE = #{fieldType}, FIELDLEN = #{fieldLen}, DEFAULTVALUE = #{defaultValue}, MEMO = #{memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CODEID = #{codeId},SAMEID = #{sameId}, VERSIONS = #{versions}, Releasedate = #{releaseDate,jdbcType=INTEGER}, FULL_CHINSEE = #{fullChinese},SIM_CHINESE = #{simChinese}, SYNONY_NAME = #{synonyName}, OBJECT_TYPE = #{objectType}, EXPRESSION_WORD = #{expressionWord},CODEID_DETAIL = #{codeIdDetail}, ISNORMAL = #{isNorMal}, RELATE = #{relate}, UNIT = #{unit}, FUSE_TYPE = #{fuseType}, FUSE_FIELDID = #{fuseFieldId}, STATUS = #{statusNum}, SUB_ORG = #{subOrg}, SUB_AUTHOR = #{subAuthor}, ON_DATE = #{onDate}, REG_ORG = #{regOrg}, FIELD_CLASS = #{fieldClass}, SECRET_CLASS = #{secretClass}, FIELD_STANDARD = #{fieldStandard}, ATTRIBUTE_WORD=#{attributeWord,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FACTURER = #{facturer},context=#{context},"constraint" = #{constraint},UPDATETIME=sysdate, UPDATER=#{updater},FIELD_RELATES=#{fieldRelates,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where upper(FIELDID) = upper(#{fieldId})
and Releasedate is null
mapper.insert: insert into synlte.SYNLTEFIELD(FIELDID,FIELDNAME,FIELDCHINESENAME,FIELDDESCRIBE,FIELDTYPE,FIELDLEN,DEFAULTVALUE, MEMO,COLUMNNAME,CODEID,SAMEID,VERSIONS,Releasedate,FULL_CHINSEE,SIM_CHINESE,SYNONY_NAME,OBJECT_TYPE, EXPRESSION_WORD,CODEID_DETAIL,ISNORMAL,RELATE,UNIT,FUSE_TYPE,FUSE_FIELDID,STATUS,SUB_ORG,SUB_AUTHOR,ON_DATE, REG_ORG,FIELD_CLASS,SECRET_CLASS,FIELD_STANDARD,FACTURER,context,"constraint",CREATETIME,UPDATETIME,CREATOR,UPDATER, ATTRIBUTE_WORD,GADSJ_FIELDID,FIELD_RELATES) select upper(#{fieldId}), upper(#{fieldName}),#{fieldChineseName},#{fieldDescribe,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{fieldType},#{fieldLen}, #{defaultValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},upper(#{columnName}), #{codeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{sameId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{versions,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{releaseDate,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fullChinese,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{simChinese,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{synonyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{objectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expressionWord,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{codeIdDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isNorMal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{relate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fuseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{fuseFieldId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statusNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{subOrg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{subAuthor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{onDate},#{regOrg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fieldClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secretClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fieldStandard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{facturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{context,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{constraint,jdbcType=VARCHAR},sysdate,sysdate,#{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{updater,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attributeWord,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{gadsjFieldId},#{fieldRelates,jdbcType=VARCHAR} from dual where not exists(select 1 from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where upper(FIELDID) = upper(#{fieldId}) or upper(COLUMNNAME) = upper(#{columnName}) )
mapper.select: select code_value as value,code_text as text from all_code_data where upper(CODE_ID) = upper(#{name})

select s.FIELDID as fieldId,COLUMNNAME as columnName, FIELDNAME as fieldName, FIELDCHINESENAME as fieldChineseName, FIELDDESCRIBE as fieldDescribe, FIELDTYPE as fieldType, FIELDLEN as fieldLen, DEFAULTVALUE as defaultValue, MEMO as memo,s.CODEID as codeId, SAMEID as sameId, IS530NEW as is530New,VERSIONS as versions, Releasedate as releaseDate, FULL_CHINSEE as fullChinese,SIM_CHINESE as simChinese,SYNONY_NAME as synonyName, OBJECT_TYPE as objectType , EXPRESSION_WORD as expressionWord, CODEID_DETAIL as codeIdDetail,ISNORMAL as isNorMal,RELATE as relate,UNIT as unit, FUSE_TYPE as fuseType, FUSE_FIELDID as fuseFieldId,STATUS as statusNum, SUB_ORG as subOrg, SUB_AUTHOR as subAuthor,ON_DATE as onDate, REG_ORG as regOrg,FIELD_CLASS as fieldClass,SECRET_CLASS as secretClass,FIELD_STANDARD as fieldStandard, FACTURER as facturer, s.context as context,s.constraint as constraint, CREATETIME as createTime, UPDATETIME as updateTime,CREATOR as creator,UPDATER as updater,GADSJ_FIELDID as gadsjFieldId from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD s where upper(FIELDID) = upper(#{fieldId})
mapper.insert: insert into synlte.SYNLTEFIELD_history(FIELDID,FIELDNAME,FIELDCHINESENAME,FIELDDESCRIBE,FIELDTYPE,FIELDLEN,DEFAULTVALUE, MEMO,COLUMNNAME,CODEID,SAMEID,IS530NEW,VERSIONS,Releasedate,FULL_CHINSEE,SIM_CHINESE,SYNONY_NAME,OBJECT_TYPE, EXPRESSION_WORD,CODEID_DETAIL,ISNORMAL,RELATE,UNIT,FUSE_TYPE,FUSE_FIELDID,STATUS,SUB_ORG,SUB_AUTHOR,ON_DATE, REG_ORG,FIELD_CLASS,SECRET_CLASS,FIELD_STANDARD,FACTURER,context,"constraint",CREATETIME,UPDATETIME,CREATOR,UPDATER, FIELDID_VERSION) select upper(#{fieldId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}), upper(#{fieldName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}),#{fieldChineseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{fieldDescribe,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{fieldType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{fieldLen,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{defaultValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upper(#{columnName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}), #{codeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{sameId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{is530New,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{versions,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{releaseDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fullChinese,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{simChinese,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{synonyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{objectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expressionWord,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{codeIdDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isNorMal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fuseType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{fuseFieldId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statusNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{subOrg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{subAuthor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{onDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{regOrg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{fieldClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{secretClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fieldStandard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{facturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{context,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{constraint,jdbcType=VARCHAR},sysdate,#{updateTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{updater,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fieldIdVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.select: select objectid from synlte.objectfield where fieldid = #{fieldId}
select valtext as label,valvalue as value,memo as memo from synlte.fieldcodeval where codeid='GACODE000415'

select fieldid as value ,fieldchinesename as label,gadsj_fieldId as memo from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD
GADSJ_FIELDID is not null and upper(substr(FIELDID,0,3)) !='WBZ' and STATUS='05' and field_standard != '99'
and fieldid =#{fieldId}
and field_standard = '2'
and field_standard = '3'
and ( (upper(fieldchinesename) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%')))) or (upper(FIELDID) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%')))) or (upper(fieldname) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%')))) )

select fieldid as value, fieldchinesename as label, gadsj_fieldId as memo from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where GADSJ_FIELDID is not null and upper(substr(FIELDID, 0, 3)) != 'WBZ' and STATUS = '05' and field_standard != '99'
select count(*) from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where fieldid = #{fieldId} and columnName = #{columnName}

select FIELDID as fieldId,FIELDNAME as fieldName,FIELDCHINESENAME as fieldChineseName,FIELDDESCRIBE as fieldDescribe, FIELDTYPE as fieldType,FIELDLEN as fieldLen,DEFAULTVALUE as defaultValue,MEMO as memo,COLUMNNAME as columnName, CODEID as codeId,SAMEID as sameId,IS530NEW as is530New,FIELD_CLASS as fieldClass,SECRET_CLASS as secretClass, SIM_CHINESE as simChinese,VERSIONS as versions,RELEASEDATE as releaseDate,SYNONY_NAME as synonyName, OBJECT_TYPE as objectType,EXPRESSION_WORD as expressionWord,CODEID_DETAIL as codeIdDetail,ISNORMAL as isNorMal, RELATE as relate,UNIT as unit,FUSE_TYPE as fuseType,FUSE_FIELDID as fuseFieldId,SUB_ORG as subOrg,SUB_AUTHOR as subAuthor, ON_DATE as onDate,REG_ORG as regOrg,FIELD_STANDARD as fieldStandard,FACTURER as facturer,CONTEXT as context, CONSTRAINT as constraint,CREATETIME as createTime,UPDATETIME as updateTime,CREATOR as creator,UPDATER as updater, STATUS as statusNum,FULL_CHINSEE as fullChinese,ATTRIBUTE_WORD as attributeWord,GADSJ_FIELDID as gadsjFieldId, FIELD_RELATES as fieldRelates from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where status = '05'

select tableid,tablename ,objectname as tableNameCh from synlte.object o left join synlte.objectfield f on o.objectid = f.objectid
UPPER(f.fieldid) = UPPER(#{fieldId}) and upper(o.relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD'
and ( upper(tablename) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchName},'%'))) or upper(objectname) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchName},'%'))) )
group by tableid,tablename,objectname
